description_long: This is a white safety helmet with a slightly rounded, robust shell and a prominent, dark-tinted visor covering the front. The helmet features visible scuff marks and scratches, indicating prior use or exposure to rough conditions. An orange horizontal stripe wraps around the rear and sides, providing high visibility, while the front displays the text 'SAPEURS-POMPIERS' above a stylized chevron emblem. There are circular, metallic vent or attachment points on each side, and the lower edge is reinforced for added durability. The overall design suggests it is intended for emergency or rescue personnel, likely firefighters.
description: A white safety helmet with a dark visor, orange rear stripe, and 'SAPEURS-POMPIERS' text, showing signs of wear and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dark visor, 'SAPEURS-POMPIERS' text, and chevron emblem prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the orange stripe, side vent, and visible scuff marks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full orange stripe wrapping around the helmet and the central ridge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the orange stripe, vent, and additional wear marks visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized chevron emblem is present on the front above the visor, accompanied by the text 'SAPEURS-POMPIERS'.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two circular side vents, one on each side, with a metallic appearance; no other visible vents.
attribute_graphic_design: White base with a single orange horizontal stripe around the rear and sides, 'SAPEURS-POMPIERS' text, and a chevron emblem on the front; overall utilitarian with minor scuff marks.
